ddls:
CREATE TABLE "energy_units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the energy unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the energy unit */,
  "unit_type" TEXT /* Type of energy unit (e.g., Power, Energy) */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* Category of energy unit (e.g., Mechanical, Electrical, Thermal) */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Indicates if the unit is a standard unit recognized by the company */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., Btu/h, hp) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_factors" (
  "conversion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion factor */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source energy unit */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target energy unit */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor from the source unit to the target unit */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Indicates if the conversion factor is custom or standard */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the conversion factor */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion factor was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the conversion factor */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion factor was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conversion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_factors_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_factors_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_factors_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_factors_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_tables" (
  "table_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion table */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source energy unit */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target energy unit */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the conversion table */,
  "table_description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion table */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the conversion table */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion table was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the conversion table */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion table was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_tables_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_tables_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_tables_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_tables_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_table_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion table entry */,
  "table_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion table */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Input value in the source unit */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Output value in the target unit */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the entry */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_table_entries_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_table_entries_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES conversion_tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_table_entries_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preferred_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred energy unit */,
  "custom_conversion_factor" REAL /* Custom conversion factor for the user */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the preference is the default for the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the preference was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_preferred_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source energy unit */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target energy unit */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Input value in the source unit */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Output value in the target unit */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "is_urgent" INTEGER /* Indicates if the request is urgent */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "completed_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was completed */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_requests_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_requests_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_conversion_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom conversion factor */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who defined the factor */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source energy unit */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target energy unit */,
  "custom_factor" REAL /* Custom conversion factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom factor */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the custom factor is approved */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the factor */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the factor was approved */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the factor was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_conversion_factors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_conversion_factors_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_conversion_factors_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_conversion_factors_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion history entry */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion request */,
  "from_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source energy unit */,
  "to_unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target energy unit */,
  "input_value" REAL /* Input value in the source unit */,
  "output_value" REAL /* Output value in the target unit */,
  "conversion_date" TEXT /* Date the conversion was performed */,
  "converted_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the conversion */,
  "conversion_status" TEXT /* Status of the conversion (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the conversion was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_converted_by FOREIGN KEY ("converted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_from_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES conversion_requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conversion_history_to_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_unit_id") REFERENCES energy_units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unit_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit group */,
  "group_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the group */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the group was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_groups_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unit_groups_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
